name: Sweet Sour Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings into three pieces each.
2. Cook the wing tips in water (enough to cover) until broth is ready.
3. Sprinkle the chicken wings with garlic salt and let them stand for one hour.
4. Roll the chicken wings in cornstarch, then in beaten egg.
5. Fry the chicken wings until they are brown and crisp. Place them in a single layer in a flat pan.
6. Prepare the sauce using the remaining ingredients, including the broth made from the chicken wing tips. Cook until the sugar melts, then pour over the chicken wings.
7. Bake at 325°F for about one hour. Baste occasionally and leave uncovered during the last 15 minutes.
